name: Heritage Collection
description: A traditional collection celebrating ancient Indian jewelry-making techniques, featuring detailed filigree and handcrafted metalwork inspired by royal palaces.

name: Aura Collection
description: A modern, minimalist collection featuring clean geometric lines, sleek edges, and lightweight daily-wear pieces with subtle matte finishes.

name: Nirvana Collection
description: A spiritually inspired collection displaying sacred patterns, lotus emblems, and mandalas designed to symbolize peace and connection.
